subject: penguins
one_liner: The flipper-worn activity band that holds your colony accountable.
brand_voice_notes: Dry consumer-health confidence with a quarterly-report cadence. Treats a penguin colony as an enterprise workforce with fitness KPIs. Never acknowledges the joke, never explains why penguins need a wearable, and frames every invasive feature as a wellness benefit. Metrics are precise, arbitrary, and delivered with total conviction.

hero.sub: Waddle is the flipper-worn activity band built for flightless seabirds. Steps, dives, huddle rotations. All of it on one dashboard, reviewed weekly, whether you asked or not.

features.title: Toboggan Detection
features.blurb: Sliding on your stomach is efficient, which is why it counts as zero steps. Waddle logs every toboggan as sedentary time and raises your daily step goal to compensate.

features.title: Huddle Rotation Compliance
features.blurb: Positional sensors track your place in the huddle to the centimeter. Linger in the warm middle and your entire rookery receives the report. Warmth is a shared resource. Act like it.

features.title: Dive Streaks
features.blurb: Log one cold-water dive a day to keep your streak alive. Streaks pause for nothing, including molt, during which you physically cannot enter the water. Champions find a way.

pricing_tiers.name: Rookery
perks: Read-only access to your own body data

pricing_tiers.name: Colony
perks: One molt-season streak freeze, per lifetime
Unlimited nudges, sent on your behalf

pricing_tiers.name: Emperor
perks: Dive data exported to a spreadsheet no one opens

testimonials.quote: I spent 61% of winter at the edge of the huddle. Now there is a chart, and everyone has seen it.
testimonials.name: Gary
testimonials.title: Edge Position Specialist, Huddle 12, Cape Crozier

testimonials.quote: Waddle flagged my toboggan commute as sedentary. I walk now. It takes four hours.
testimonials.name: Deborah
testimonials.title: Second-Clutch Parent of One, Boulders Beach

testimonials.quote: We banded 4,000 birds in November. Engagement is up 300%. We have not defined engagement.
testimonials.name: Dr. Lauren Pace
testimonials.title: Assistant Deputy Director of Colony Metrics, Ross Sea Field Station

demo_screen_concept: A colony fitness dashboard: a sortable leaderboard of banded penguins showing waddle steps, dive count, and huddle compliance percentage, with three activity rings (Waddle, Dive, Shiver) per bird; rookery filter tabs; clicking a row opens a detail panel with weekly stats and streak status; a coral Nudge button sends a passive-aggressive accountability ping and increments a public nudge counter.

images.rationale: Hero earned its slot: the claymorphic direction's hero composition is a banded penguin vignette, which only reads if the penguin exists. Demo assets skipped: the leaderboard uses small clay avatar circles and activity rings, CSS-native. Remaining budget on 3 testimonial headshots (two penguins, one human researcher for the Ross Sea quote).

items.prompt: Soft 3D claymation-style render of a single emperor penguin standing in profile on smooth sculpted snow, wearing a small coral-orange fitness band around one flipper, coral hue matching hex FF6B4A, pale glacier-ice backdrop matching hex E9F2F6 with soft rounded ice mounds, deep teal-navy shadow accents matching hex 14343F, matte clay texture, soft studio lighting, gentle diffuse shadows, minimalist product-launch composition with calm empty space around the subject. No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks, no rendered UI screens.

Soft 3D claymation-style corporate headshot portrait of a single adult Adelie penguin facing the camera with a flat neutral deadpan expression, head and shoulders framing like an employee ID photo, matte clay texture, plain pale ice-blue studio backdrop matching hex DCEBF2, soft even studio lighting, a tiny coral accent band matching hex FF6B4A barely visible on one flipper. No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks, no rendered UI screens.

Soft 3D claymation-style corporate headshot portrait of a single gentoo penguin with white eye patches and orange beak, facing the camera with a mildly weary deadpan expression, head and shoulders framing like an employee ID photo, matte clay texture, plain pale ice-blue studio backdrop matching hex DCEBF2, soft even studio lighting. No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks, no rendered UI screens.

Soft 3D claymation-style corporate headshot portrait of a single middle-aged woman scientist wearing a bright red expedition parka with fur-lined hood down, facing the camera with a flat professional deadpan expression, head and shoulders framing like a staff directory photo, matte clay texture, plain pale ice-blue studio backdrop matching hex DCEBF2, soft even studio lighting, deep teal-navy clothing accents matching hex 14343F. No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks, no rendered UI screens.

design_direction.style: Claymorphic arctic consumer-health, glacier daylight mode. The page is staged like the launch site of a heavily funded wearables company whose entire addressable market is flightless. A pale glacier-ice ground carries soft drifting cold-air gradients, and every surface is molded clay: puffy cards with large 24px radii, soft dual shadows (a tight inner highlight up top, a wide diffuse drop below) so panels read as pressed snow rather than paper. No glass, no blur veils, no hairline keylines, no hard offset shadows, no grain. One deep antarctic ink-teal carries the wordmark, headlines, and all structural text; one rationed krill coral, the color of the food and the beak, is reserved strictly for the single primary CTA per section, the live streak flame, and every accountability affordance (nudges, compliance warnings), and appears almost nowhere else; a soft ice-blue tints the clay surfaces and ring tracks. Baloo 2 sets the wordmark and headlines in rounded confident consumer-health weights that would look at home on a pill bottle or a marathon bib; DM Sans carries plain, faintly clinical body copy. Every figure that pretends to be biometric telemetry (step counts, dive depths, huddle compliance percentages, tier prices, streak days) is set in JetBrains Mono with tabular figures inside small clay chips so it reads like sensor output, not marketing. Motion is soft-bodied: activity rings sweep to value once on scroll, clay buttons squish to 97% scale on press, stat chips settle with a gentle rise, the streak flame breathes on a 5s cycle, all gated behind prefers-reduced-motion. No dark mode, no neon, no condensed signage caps, no serifs, no bento lattice, no marquee. Reads like a company that genuinely believes the huddle is a productivity problem.

fonts.body: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

design_direction.archetype: Consumer wearable hardware landing, Fitbit-adjacent: rounded wordmark nav, split hero with copy left and a clay device vignette right (banded penguin with floating stat chips and activity rings), three clay feature cards, testimonial row with headshots, three-tier pricing, coral CTA band, footer.
design_direction.motion_vocab: Soft-bodied squish: buttons compress to 97% on press, activity rings sweep to value once on scroll, stat chips rise 6px and settle, streak flame breathes on a 5s cycle, everything gated behind prefers-reduced-motion.
design_direction.hero_composition_notes: Split hero on glacier ice: ink-teal headline and clinical sub left with a single coral CTA; right side is a large clay vignette of a banded penguin (image if generated, CSS clay illustration fallback) with floating clay stat chips (waddle steps, dive depth, huddle compliance) and a trio of activity rings.
